summary: Tested Vehicle Weight (Weighbridge) feature - v55.9.0. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly. Live scale simulation, weight entry CRUD, second weight dialog, net weight calculation, PDF slip generation, and export endpoints verified.
seed_data_creation: Created test weight entries during backend testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vehicle Weight feature fully tested. Tab navigation requires JavaScript click (page.evaluate) as Playwright force=True doesn't work. WhatsNew dialog appears on login - dismiss with Escape. Serial port weight reading is MOCKED via Simulate Weight button. Camera feed uses getUserMedia which shows placeholder in cloud.

backend_apis.GET /api/vehicle-weight: PASS - Lists weight entries with filters
backend_apis.GET /api/vehicle-weight/pending: PASS - Returns pending entries awaiting second weight
backend_apis.POST /api/vehicle-weight: PASS - Creates entry with first weight, status=pending
backend_apis.PUT /api/vehicle-weight/{id}/second-weig: PASS - Updates second weight, calculates net, sets status=completed
backend_apis.DELETE /api/vehicle-weight/{id}: PASS - Deletes entry, returns 404 for nonexistent

frontend_ui.Vehicle Weight tab navigation: PASS - Tab button works with JavaScript click
frontend_ui.Live Weighbridge display: PASS - Shows 00,000 when idle, green color when stable
frontend_ui.Simulate Weight button: PASS - Triggers weight animation with realistic fluctuation
frontend_ui.STABLE status: PASS - Shows 'STABLE - Weight Locked' when simulation completes
frontend_ui.Camera Feed panel: PASS - Shows with Start/Stop toggle, placeholder when off
frontend_ui.New Weight Entry dialog: PASS - Opens with all form fields (date, vehicle, party, farmer, product, bags, first weight)
frontend_ui.Pending vehicles banner: PASS - Shows count and clickable buttons for pending entries
frontend_ui.Second Weight dialog: PASS - Opens from table row, shows entry details, calculates net weight preview
frontend_ui.Net weight calculation: PASS - Correctly calculates first - second = net (e.g., 15000 - 6000 = 9000)
frontend_ui.Completed entries: PASS - Show Done badge with PDF download and delete buttons
frontend_ui.Table structure: PASS - All expected columns present (RST, Date, Vehicle, Party, Product, Bags, First Wt, Second Wt, Net Wt, Status, Actions)

mocked_features.Serial port weight reading: MOCKED - Simulate Weight button generates random weight with realistic fluctuation animation
mocked_features.Camera feed: MOCKED - getUserMedia won't work in cloud but shows placeholder

export_columns_verification.Note: Cash/Diesel columns only exist in /api/export/truck-payments-excel (separate endpoint for truck payments)
